title: Filter Widget based on date of an item
excerpt: I am trying to filter a dashboard widget to sum the total budget before the date of a milestone on the board. Is there anyway to filter based on the date specified on a item in the board?

posts.author: lnorris25 (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to filter a dashboard widget to sum the total budget before the date of a milestone on the board. Is there anyway to filter based on the date specified on a item in the board?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Liam,

Whilst it’s possible to filter by date specific to each board (via advanced filters) as shown below…

Screen Shot 2024-02-13 at 3.50.24 pm1186×652 42.8 KB

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to filter by a specific date in each board, if this is what you’re looking to achieve? I apologise for the setback!

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @lnorris25 ,

I think yes we can do this if i understand your problem correctly. Attaching few screenshots for you to have a look.

Screenshot 2024-02-13 at 11.26.13 AM1920×904 74.1 KB

Screenshot 2024-02-13 at 11.26.54 AM1920×904 81.1 KB

posts.author: lnorris25 (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml: Ok, do you know if there are any 3rd party apps that enable this?

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml:
Bianca Taylor:

I am afraid it isn’t currently possible to filter by a specific date in each board, if this is what you’re looking to achieve? I apologise for the setback!

Hello! you can use in advanced filters the option filter by date, then the condition “between” and then choose a specific period that can be the one you want.

Captura de Pantalla 2024-02-13 a la(s) 15.04.57977×525 38 KB

Captura de Pantalla 2024-02-13 a la(s) 15.06.29741×165 12.8 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: You’re right!! Great flag Jose - thank you for raising this

posts.author: JoseV (Jose )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca! I’m glad to hear it! I’m looking forward to what I can do to help the community. I hope this information is helpful to @lnorris25 .

posts.author: lnorris25 (Liam)
posts.cookedHtml: I am wanting the specific date to be tied to a date that is specified in an item. I don’t want to have to select the date. So if the date in the item changes the filter on the widget will adjust as well.
